title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 878 Peachtree St, Atlanta
description: Intimate 74-seat venue inside the iconic Vortex Bar & Grill. The best locally touring and nationally touring comedians doing their best 10-minute sets. Great energy, relaxed vibe — perfect for a couple who loves to laugh together. Seats assigned at door.

title: Piedmont Park Green Market
description: Atlanta's iconic Saturday farmers market. Walk the vendors, grab fresh food, people-watch. Low-key, cute, no pressure — great morning date. Food trucks, local produce, artisan goods.

title: Atlanta Botanical Garden: Frog Feeding
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE
description: Fun, quirky morning activity at the Botanical Garden. Learn about frogs, explore the exhibits — a nice add-on to a morning market stroll in Piedmont Park.

title: Xscape: The Mother's Day Love Affair
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Iconic R&B group Xscape reunites for a Mother's Day concert at the gorgeous Fox Theatre. Great for couples who love 90s R&B — smooth harmonies, nostalgia, and a legendary venue. Book early!

title: Friday Jazz at the High
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Live jazz at the High every third Friday. This month features Rafael Pereira and friends on the Sifly Piazza and Orkin Terrace. Enjoy drinks, light bites, docent-led tours, and exploring the galleries. Perfect romantic evening — art, music, wine.

title: Daft Punk Night
location: Hell at The Masquerade, 695 Crest Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Dance all night to Daft Punk hits, remixes, French house classics, and electronic anthems with immersive visuals. 18+. Masquerade is one of Atlanta's best dance venues — great energy, packed floor, perfect for couples who love to move.

title: Slow Drag — Audio Gumbo x Black Intimacy Dance Party
description: Monthly dance party inspiring Black intimacy and celebrating Black culture through 70s slow jams. 'Nothing like it in the city. A vibe!!!!' — loved by attendees. Ideal for couples who want a deeper, more intentional dance experience. Check audio-gumbo.com for details.

title: Cocktails in the Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE
description: Garden's popular after-hours event — specialty cocktails, live music, explore the Niki in the Garden exhibition dramatically lit at night, Canopy Walk, and the Earth Goddess sculpture. Every Thursday through July 30. Great date vibe — atmospheric, beautiful, not too pricey.

title: Cocktails in the Garden (Ongoing)
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE
description: Every Thursday at the Garden — specialty cocktails, live music, explore exhibits at night. Romantic setting, beautiful lights, good food from Longleaf Restaurant. Ongoing through July.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Massive reggae/dancehall lineup featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, Ding Dong, Vanessa Bling, Serani, Tony Matterhorn & T.O.K. at State Farm Arena. If you love island music and dancing, this is the event of the month. Big energy, great vibes for couples who love to dance.

title: HELD: Black Women and The Womb Opening
description: Powerful opening night celebrating Black women through art. Great conversation starter. Intimate gallery setting — ideal for a thoughtful, cultured date. Don't miss it if you're in Atlanta this weekend.

title: Spruill Gallery: 'Returns' Exhibition
location: Spruill Gallery, 4681 Ashford Dunwoody Rd, Dunwoody
description: Group exhibition featuring Hamidullah — runs through May at Spruill Gallery. Wed-Sun, 11-3. Low-key, cultured date. Walk around, grab coffee after in Dunwoody. Great way to spend an afternoon together.

title: Salsa & Bachata Night — Hangeo Thursdays
description: Latin dance social — beginners welcome! Salsa and Bachata night. Great way to break a sweat together and learn something new. Perfect for couples who want to get active and learn to dance. Every Thursday.
